subcodes.first_line: O ye who are steadfast and risen up, render thanks unto God that ye have attained unto supreme honor and the most great bounty of serving the loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان ای نابتان شکر کنید خدا را که بشرف و موهبت کبری فائزید و بخدمت احبا
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @poems and quotation from poetry, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @praise and encouragement
